title: [Bug]: `truncate`返回了预期之外的类型，导致`select distinct`出现预期之外的结果
description: master分支版本，`truncate`返回了预期之外的类型，导致`select distinct`出现预期之外的结果。
poc:
select distinct出现预期之外的结果


```
mysql> SELECT
    ->   ref_0.c_bg9krh as c0
    -> FROM
    ->   t_qch as ref_0
    -> 
    -> UNION
    -> (SELECT DISTINCT
    ->   truncate(
    ->       cast(round(
    ->         cast(cast((3233656 % ref_1.c3) as signed) as signed)) as signed), 
    ->       cast(ref_1.c2 as signed)) as c0
    -> FROM
    ->   t_a_ez9jc59 as ref_1)
    -> ORDER BY
    ->   c0 
    -> LIMIT 117;
CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
key_bug_features: truncate returns unexpected type affecting select distinct results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t_test (id, value) VALUES (1, 123.45), (2, NULL), (3, 678.90);
SELECT DISTINCT TRUNCATE(ROUND(CAST(value AS SIGNED)), 1) AS truncated_value FROM t_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t_subquery (ref_id INT, ref_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t_subquery (ref_id, ref_value) SELECT id, value FROM t_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
